name: Table Top Ironing Board Gray - Room Essentials™: Portable Small Steel Countertop, 30" x 12" Solid Pattern
description: Conveniently iron your clothes with the Tabletop Ironing Board from Room Essentials™. This tabletop ironing board features a metal mesh ironing design with a padded cover to offer you a smooth ironing surface, and it's balanced on a metal frame to ensure less slipping or sliding while ironing. Featuring a foldable design for easy storage, it also has a loop at the back for hanging from a hook behind the door or in the closet for space-efficient storage.
